facility_name: Compass Datacenters --- Vertiv CoolPhase Flex Deployment
opportunity_summary: First CoolPhase Flex units deployed at Compass facility in Q1 2025. Multi-year, multi-billion dollar supply arrangement. CoolPhase Flex integrates liquid cooling with refrigerant-based air cooling and heat rejection in a single packaged system. Anchor customer for the platform.
notes: Vertiv vendor ecosystem. CoolPhase Flex co-developed with Compass. First deployment Q1 2025. Exact campus not disclosed publicly.

facility_name: Elea Data Centers --- Vertiv Liquid Cooling (Sao Paulo)
opportunity_summary: Hundreds of Vertiv CDUs ordered for Elea's Sao Paulo AI data center sites. Part of $300M first-phase investment. First Latin American commercial DC to adopt liquid-to-chip CDUs. PUE target 1.15-1.2. First phase delivered 2025. Nine sites powered by 100% renewables.
notes: Vertiv vendor ecosystem. Announced Nov 2024. First Vertiv liquid cooling for purpose-built AI DCs in Brazil. Landmark deployment for LATAM region.

facility_name: Schneider Electric / Motivair --- Supercomputer Liquid Cooling (HPC)
opportunity_summary: Motivair CDU technology enables thermal performance for 6 of the world's top 10 supercomputers. Certified for NVIDIA hardware. Schneider acquired controlling interest in Motivair Feb 2025. Fourth production facility opened in Buffalo, NY (Jun 2025). Also expanding in Italy and India. Tripling global manufacturing capacity.
notes: Schneider Electric vendor ecosystem. Motivair HQ in Buffalo, NY. Since 2019 was Cray supercomputer liquid cooling provider at densities up to 400kW/rack. Specific supercomputer customer names not disclosed.

facility_name: Schneider Electric / Motivair --- NVIDIA Reference Design Deployments
opportunity_summary: Schneider Electric collaborates with NVIDIA on reference designs for DGX SuperPods. Prefabricated EcoStruxure Pod Data Centers support pods up to 1MW+. Motivair in-rack liquid cooling with EIA, ORV3 and NVIDIA MGX modular standards. MCDU-45 and MCDU-55 CDUs available globally, production ramping Q1 2026.
notes: Schneider Electric vendor ecosystem. Reference designs co-developed with NVIDIA. Customer-specific deployments not publicly named.

facility_name: Google --- Danfoss Turbocor Cooling & Heat Reuse Partnership
cooling_type: chiller (Danfoss Turbocor compressors) + heat reuse modules
opportunity_summary: Danfoss providing Turbocor compressors and heat reuse modules for Google data centers. Heat recovery supplies renewable energy for on-site heating and neighboring communities. Partnership announced Jan 2024 at AHR Expo. Net Zero Innovation Hub co-founded with Google in Fredericia, Denmark (Sep 2023).
notes: Danfoss vendor ecosystem. Strategic partnership includes AI solutions exchange. Specific DC sites not named publicly. Fredericia used as representative location for the partnership hub.

facility_name: NTT Continental Europe --- Danfoss Turbocor Chiller Deployment
opportunity_summary: NTT Continental Europe uses Danfoss Turbocor exclusively as compressors in installed chillers. Stepless speed control via frequency converters provides significant improvement in part-load efficiency. Deployed for approximately 2 years (as of case study publication).
notes: Danfoss vendor ecosystem. NTT case study. Frankfurt used as representative NTT Continental Europe location.

facility_name: Equinix Amsterdam --- Danfoss VLT Drives Deployment
cooling_type: advanced HVAC (Danfoss VLT HVAC Drive FC 102)
opportunity_summary: Approximately 135 Danfoss VLT HVAC Drive FC 102 units in operation at Equinix Amsterdam. Controls pumps and ventilators for heat extraction from server rooms. Not liquid cooling per se, but Danfoss cooling ecosystem presence at major colo.
notes: Danfoss vendor ecosystem. Drive-level deployment, not liquid cooling. Included for vendor ecosystem mapping.

facility_name: San Diego Wireless Technology Company --- Danfoss Turbocor Chillers
opportunity_summary: Three 1,400-ton ArcticCool chillers powered by 21 Danfoss Turbocor compressors. Over 30% annual savings on compressor energy costs. World-leading wireless technology company (likely Qualcomm given San Diego HQ).
notes: Danfoss vendor ecosystem. Customer not named in case study but location strongly suggests Qualcomm.

facility_name: HPE-Danfoss --- Data Center Heat Recovery Module
cooling_type: heat recovery module (Danfoss Turbocor heat pump/chiller)
opportunity_summary: HPE IT Sustainability Services - Data Center Heat Recovery module. Off-the-shelf product leveraging Danfoss Turbocor compressors. Cools DCs up to 30% more efficiently while recovering and reusing excess heat. Announced Jun 2024.
notes: Danfoss vendor ecosystem. Product partnership, not site-specific deployment. Houston used as HPE HQ representative.

facility_name: ThermalWorks / Edged --- Waterless Cooling with Danfoss Turbocor (Multiple Sites)
opportunity_summary: ThermalWorks deploying integrated waterless cooling with Danfoss Turbocor TGS 230 compressors to 12+ data centers operational or under construction worldwide. Supports up to 70kW/rack air and 200kW/rack liquid. 73% reduction in overhead energy. Won Danfoss EnVisioneer Award 2023 and 2024.
notes: Danfoss vendor ecosystem. ThermalWorks ships to clients across Europe and North America. 12+ DCs confirmed. Individual site names not disclosed.

facility_name: US Hyperscaler --- Munters $215M CRAH Order (Multiple US Sites)
cooling_type: air/hybrid (Munters custom CRAHs for AI data halls)
opportunity_summary: Record $215M combined order from single US hyperscaler. Custom-designed CRAHs for air-cooled and hybrid AI data halls. Deliveries at multiple US DCs from end of 2026 through early 2028. Largest combined order from a single Munters customer ever. Booked Q4 2025.
notes: Munters vendor ecosystem. Customer identity not disclosed. Ashburn VA used as representative coordinate for US hyperscaler corridor.

facility_name: US AI Colocation Provider --- Munters $82M Chiller Order
opportunity_summary: Munters $82M chiller order from US colocation provider centered around HPC for AI. Large AI facility for a hyperscale tenant. Deliveries during 2026.
notes: Munters vendor ecosystem. Customer identity not disclosed.

facility_name: US Colocation Provider --- Munters 2.1 BSEK Order (CDUs, CRAHs, Chillers)
opportunity_summary: Munters 2.1 BSEK (~$200M) order for CRAHs, CDUs, and chillers from US colocation company. Deliveries Q4 2026 through Q1 2028. Includes Coolant Distribution Units confirming liquid cooling component.
notes: Munters vendor ecosystem. Customer identity not disclosed. CDU inclusion confirms liquid cooling deployment.

facility_name: US Colocation Provider --- Munters $35M LCX CDU Order
opportunity_summary: Landmark $35M order from leading US DC colocation provider for Munters LCX liquid-to-liquid CDUs. Announced Nov 2024. First major LCX CDU order.
notes: Munters vendor ecosystem. LCX CDU is liquid-to-liquid, confirming direct liquid cooling deployment.

facility_name: Irish Government OPW --- Munters Oasis Deployment
opportunity_summary: 14 Munters Oasis units installed in OPW's 2.4 MW government facility. Stores all data for Irish government policy implementation. Funded by Irish Government and EU under National Recovery and Resilience Plan. Oasis uses up to 80% less energy than conventional cooling.
notes: Munters vendor ecosystem. Government sector deployment. Dublin used as representative location.

facility_name: Alfa Laval FreeWaterLoop --- Product Launch (No Customer Sites Yet)
opportunity_summary: FreeWaterLoop launched 4 Mar 2026 at Data Center World London. Combines pump engineering, heat exchanger tech, and filtration. Uses natural water sources (rivers, lakes, sea). Minimizes net water consumption. Reduces physical plant footprint vs air-based systems. No customer deployments publicly announced yet.
notes: Alfa Laval vendor ecosystem. Brand-new product entry to DC market. No verified customer deployments as of Apr 2026. Lund is Alfa Laval HQ.

facility_name: Databarn Amsterdam --- Stulz CyberCool 2 Deployment
opportunity_summary: Stulz CyberCool 2 chiller deployed at Databarn Amsterdam's DC on Zekeringstraat. 5,100 kg unit lifted onto roof by crane. Uses outside air for energy savings. Cold water machines reduce energy consumption by tens of percent.
notes: Stulz vendor ecosystem. Databarn Amsterdam confirmed deployment.

facility_name: Interconnect Eindhoven --- Stulz CyberCool 2 + CyberAir 3 Deployment
cooling_type: chiller + precision air (Stulz CyberCool 2 x6, CyberAir 3 units)
opportunity_summary: Six Stulz CyberCool 2 chillers (1,200 kW each) on roof plus CyberAir 3 units in server rooms. 200kW per CyberAir unit in 400kW rooms. Custom adiabatic cooling containers. Free Cooling mode capable. Largest independent DC provider in southern Netherlands.
notes: Stulz vendor ecosystem. Comprehensive deployment: engineering, supply, assembly, installation.

facility_name: CyrusOne Frankfurt --- Airedale by Modine Cooling Deployment
opportunity_summary: Airedale deployed enhanced cooling at CyrusOne's 54MW Frankfurt campus. Achieved PUE of 1.18. Working with Sudlows. 34% energy saving vs client baseline model. Up to 44% savings vs standard product designs. Complete solution: high-performance systems + advanced controls.
notes: Airedale/Modine vendor ecosystem. Published case study. CyrusOne selected Airedale for European DCs (2020 announcement).

facility_name: Undisclosed AI Infrastructure Developer --- Airedale $180M Order
opportunity_summary: $180M order from a leading AI infrastructure developer for Airedale by Modine DC cooling systems (Feb 2025). Purpose-built for scalable, cost-effective AI applications. Manufactured at Rockbridge VA and Grenada MS facilities. Delivery throughout 2025 and H1 2026. Expected long-term partnership for largest HPC clusters in the world.
notes: Airedale/Modine vendor ecosystem. Customer identity undisclosed. Described as building 'some of the largest, high-performance computing clusters in the world.' Richmond VA used as representative coordinate.

facility_name: Digital Edge NARRA1 Manila --- Nortek StatePoint Deployment
opportunity_summary: First commercial colo operator to deploy StatePoint in Asia. 2,200 cabinets, 10MW IT power. Annualized PUE 1.193, WUE 1.355. Saves 35-50% on water and 20% on power. Joint venture with Threadborne Group. Won W.Media Asia Pacific award for Innovation in Energy Efficiency. Opened early 2023.
notes: Nortek vendor ecosystem. Award-winning deployment. First StatePoint in Asia.

facility_name: Empyrion KR1 Gangnam Seoul --- Nortek StatePoint Deployment
opportunity_summary: Nortek StatePoint deployed at KR1 Gangnam Data Centre in Yangjae-dong, Seocho-gu, Seoul. 30,714 sqm, 29.4 MW IT load. PUE 1.3, WUE 1.6. AI and HPC ready. First new DC in Gangnam in over a decade. Announced Sep 2025. Ready for service Aug 2025. Empyrion's second DC after SG1 Dodid.
notes: Nortek vendor ecosystem. Major deployment in South Korea. AI-ready facility.

facility_name: Meta --- Nortek StatePoint Co-Development (Multiple US Sites)
opportunity_summary: Meta and Nortek co-developed StatePoint Liquid Cooling system starting 2015. First-of-its-kind for DCs. Reduces water usage 20% in hot/humid climates and 90% in cooler climates vs indirect cooling. Three operational modes. Over 500 StatePoint units deployed across 1M+ sqft industry-wide. Prineville OR was key development site.
notes: Nortek vendor ecosystem. Meta is anchor co-development partner. StatePoint then commercialized to other customers.

facility_name: Trane/LiquidStack --- NTT Mitaka Immersion Cooling (Japan)
opportunity_summary: NTT tested LiquidStack two-phase immersion cooling at Mitaka Data Center East (Mar-Apr 2022). IT kit ran stably using 97% less cooling energy than traditional systems. NTT committed to immersion cooling for energy-saving DC services.
notes: Trane/LiquidStack vendor ecosystem (LiquidStack acquired by Trane Mar 2026). Pioneer deployment in Japan.

facility_name: Trane/LiquidStack --- NTT Navi Mumbai Immersion Cooling (India)
opportunity_summary: NTT's first production immersion deployment and APAC's largest at the time. 4.8 MW capacity over 13,740 sqft at Navi Mumbai Data Center. LiquidStack two-phase immersion technology.
notes: Trane/LiquidStack vendor ecosystem. APAC's largest immersion cooling deployment at launch.

facility_name: Trane/LiquidStack --- Standard Power Coshocton OH (Immersion Cooling)
opportunity_summary: First large-scale US colocation DC to use two-phase immersion cooling. 125-acre site in Coshocton OH between Columbus and Akron. 12MW liquid-cooled (LiquidStack DataTank 48U, initially 24 units scaling to 96). Total site scales to 52MW (40MW air-cooled + 12MW immersion). Powered by shale gas with planned nuclear power.
notes: Trane/LiquidStack vendor ecosystem. Landmark US immersion cooling deployment.

facility_name: Trane/LiquidStack --- 120MW Immersion Data Center (Azerbaijan)
opportunity_summary: 120MW two-phase immersion-cooled data center. Largest liquid-cooled data center ever built (as of deployment, 2018). LiquidStack technology. Operator not publicly named.
notes: Trane/LiquidStack vendor ecosystem. Baku used as representative Azerbaijan location. Likely crypto mining infrastructure given scale and date.

facility_name: Trane/LiquidStack --- 40MW Immersion Data Center (Georgia)
opportunity_summary: 40MW two-phase immersion-cooled data center in Georgia (country). Densest immersion cooled DC in the world at time of deployment (2015). First LiquidStack large-scale deployment.
notes: Trane/LiquidStack vendor ecosystem. Tbilisi used as representative Georgian location. Likely crypto mining infrastructure.

facility_name: Trane/Stellar Energy --- Jacksonville FL Manufacturing (Customer Deployments)
opportunity_summary: Trane acquired Stellar Energy Digital (expected closing early 2026). Stellar designs modular cooling plants, central utility plants, and CDUs for liquid-cooled DCs. HQ Jacksonville FL with two assembly facilities and ~700 employees. Adds turnkey liquid-to-chip capability to Trane portfolio. CDUs from 2.5MW to 10MW.
notes: Trane vendor ecosystem. Stellar Energy's existing DC customer base transfers to Trane. Specific customer sites not disclosed.

facility_name: CoolIT/Ecolab --- ORNL Frontier Supercomputer (Oak Ridge TN)
opportunity_summary: CoolIT SplitFlow passive coldplates cooling 9,408 nodes in 74 HPE Cray EX cabinets. First exascale system (1.102 exaFLOPS). 40MW peak power. 372 sqm footprint. World's first exascale supercomputer. CoolIT direct liquid cooling.
notes: CoolIT/Ecolab vendor ecosystem. Ecolab acquiring CoolIT for $4.75B (announced Mar 2026, closing expected Q3 2026). Flagship HPC deployment.

facility_name: CoolIT/Ecolab --- LLNL El Capitan Supercomputer (Livermore CA)
opportunity_summary: CoolIT Split-Flow single-phase direct liquid cooling for 11,000+ compute nodes in 87 HPE Cray EX255a racks. World's most powerful supercomputer at 1.742 exaFLOPS (HPL) / 2.79 exaFLOPS peak. Collaboration with NNSA, HPE, and AMD. Surpasses Frontier.
notes: CoolIT/Ecolab vendor ecosystem. Two of top 3 world supercomputers cooled by CoolIT. National security computing.

facility_name: CoolIT/Ecolab --- 300+ Data Center Deployments (Global)
opportunity_summary: CoolIT operates in 300+ DCs worldwide. Cools 4 of top 10 supercomputers and 4 of top 5 greenest supercomputers. OEM partnerships: Dell, HPE, Supermicro, Intel, Huawei. Custom solutions for NVIDIA and AMD chip developers. Production scaled 25x in 18 months. Starfield factory in Calgary + expansion planned in China and Vietnam (2026). Ecolab acquiring for $4.75B (~$550M projected 12-month revenue).
notes: CoolIT/Ecolab vendor ecosystem. Calgary HQ used as representative coordinate. Individual DC customer names mostly confidential.

facility_name: CoolIT/Ecolab --- Getworks Yuzawa GX Data Center (Japan)
opportunity_summary: Getworks deployed Supermicro liquid-cooled solutions (with CoolIT DLC technology) at Yuzawa GX Data Center in Niigata Prefecture. Collaboration with GX Technology Inc. for next-generation AI-ready DCs.
notes: CoolIT/Ecolab vendor ecosystem (via Supermicro OEM integration). Japan deployment.

facility_name: Ecolab --- Existing 1,000+ Data Center Water Treatment Footprint
cooling_type: water treatment + liquid cooling (Ecolab + CoolIT integration)
opportunity_summary: Ecolab already serves 1,000+ DCs with water treatment and cooling water management. CoolIT acquisition doubles Global High-Tech market opportunity from $5B to $10B. Deep preexisting relationships with major hyperscaler and colocation customers. Combined offering: water treatment + direct liquid cooling. Expected to close Q3 2026.
notes: Ecolab/CoolIT vendor ecosystem. Strategic rationale for $4.75B acquisition. Saint Paul MN is Ecolab HQ.

facility_name: Munters --- Daleville VA Manufacturing Expansion
opportunity_summary: 200,000 sqft expansion at Daleville VA. Consolidates all Virginia production. New chiller test laboratory. Enables local production of Geoclima chiller technology. Products: CW-CRAHs, Fan Coil Arrays, CDUs, SyCool chillers, AHUs. Construction spring 2025, completion Q2 2026.
notes: Munters vendor ecosystem. Manufacturing hub for US DC cooling market.

facility_name: Airedale by Modine --- Bradford UK Manufacturing
cooling_type: CRAH, fan wall manufacturing (Airedale by Modine)
opportunity_summary: New 14.6 acre production facility in Bradford UK. Manufacturing CRAHs and fan wall units. Production began 2 months ahead of schedule. Combined with Leeds chiller facility, 150% increase in UK data center production capacity. Also has facilities in Spain (Guadalajara), UAE (Dubai), and North America.
notes: Airedale/Modine vendor ecosystem. UK manufacturing base for European DC market.

facility_name: Stulz --- Hamburg HQ Liquid Cooling Manufacturing Expansion
opportunity_summary: Stulz expanding Hamburg HQ production capacity for liquid cooling. CyberCool CMU combines air and liquid cooling in a single hybrid system. Also launched CDU product line for data centers. Global manufacturing network across Europe, Asia, North and South America.
notes: Stulz vendor ecosystem. Hamburg is global manufacturing center for CyberCool range.

facility_name: Nortek --- StatePoint 500+ Unit Install Base (Global)
opportunity_summary: Over 500 StatePoint units deployed globally, cooling 1,000,000+ sqft of DC space. 400% increase in year-on-year demand in Q3 2024 including several hyperscalers. Orders up 500% YoY. New 5MW+ skidded CDU launched Sep 2025 for hyperscale liquid cooling.
notes: Nortek vendor ecosystem. Oklahoma City HQ used as representative. 500+ unit install base is a strong market presence indicator.

facility_name: Danfoss --- 140,000+ Turbocor Compressors Installed Globally
cooling_type: Turbocor oil-free centrifugal compressors for DC chillers
opportunity_summary: 140,000+ Turbocor compressors installed worldwide in various data center applications. Oil-free magnetic bearing technology. Latest TGS380 compressor for high-density AI DCs. Also developing isobutane (R600a) Turbocor for natural refrigerant applications (announced MCE 2026). Celebrating 30th anniversary.
notes: Danfoss vendor ecosystem. Nordborg Denmark is global HQ. Compressors are embedded in third-party chiller systems across DC market.
